name: create_payment
description: Create a direct debit payment in GoCardless to collect money from a customer's bank account. You need an active mandate (authorization) from the customer before creating a payment. The payment is collected automatically via the bank's direct debit scheme (SEPA, Bacs, ACH, etc.).

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The payment amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. pence for GBP, cents for EUR). Must be a positive integer.

parameters.name: links[mandate]
parameters.description: The ID of the mandate to collect the payment against (starts with 'MD').

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A human-readable description of the payment.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Key-value pairs to store custom data with the payment. Max 3 keys, each max 500 characters.

parameters.name: charge_date
parameters.description: The date on which the payment should be collected in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be in the future and on a working day.

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: A reference that appears on the customer's bank statement. Limited by the scheme (max 10-18 chars).

parameters.name: retry_if_possible
parameters.description: If true, GoCardless will automatically retry the payment if it fails. Default true for some schemes.
